summary: Coach Dashboard Overhaul Phases 3-5 testing completed successfully. All 15 requested features verified working: Phase 3 Support Pod refinements (ActiveIssueBanner with WHAT TO DO NOW/WHAT IS WRONG/WHAT CHANGED, NextActions grouped by OVERDUE/READY/UPCOMING, AthleteSnapshot with Pipeline Health and engagement labels, PodMembers with PRIMARY COACH badge), Phase 4 UpcomingEvents enhancements (athletes attending, who needs attention, amber issue badges, prep steps left), Phase 5 Language & UX polish (human-friendly action language, CSS variable theming in ActivityFeed, 'need action' instead of 'alerts').
context_for_next_testing_agent: Coach Dashboard Phases 3-5 fully tested. Key components: ActiveIssueBanner (data-testid: active-issue-banner, banner-recommended-action, banner-recommended-text, banner-why, banner-what-changed, banner-log-call, banner-send-message, banner-resolve), NextActions (data-testid: next-actions), AthleteSnapshot (data-testid: athlete-snapshot, snapshot-momentum, snapshot-pipeline-health, snapshot-targets), PodMembers (data-testid: pod-members, pod-member-{role}). Support Pod route: /support-pods/{athlete_id}. Coach credentials: coach.williams@capymatch.com / coach123
